shellCommands.command: cd /home/user/workspace && find . -maxdepth 3 -type f | sed 's#^./##' | sort | head -400

cd /home/user/workspace && find . -maxdepth 3 \( -path './node_modules' -o -path './.git' \) -prune -o -type f | sed 's#^./##' | sort | grep -E '^(pages|app|components|src|lib|middleware|next.config|tsconfig|package.json|public|styles)'

cd /home/user/workspace && sed -n '1,220p' package.json && printf '
--- next.config.ts ---
' && sed -n '1,220p' next.config.ts && printf '
--- pages/_app.js ---
' && sed -n '1,220p' pages/_app.js && printf '
--- pages/_document.js ---
' && sed -n '1,220p' pages/_document.js && printf '
--- pages/_error.js ---
' && sed -n '1,220p' pages/_error.js && printf '
--- pages/index.js ---
' && sed -n '1,220p' pages/index.js && printf '
--- pages/blog/index.js ---
' && sed -n '1,220p' pages/blog/index.js && printf '
--- pages/blog/[id].js ---
' && sed -n '1,260p' pages/blog/[id].js && printf '
--- pages/404.js ---
' && sed -n '1,220p' pages/404.js && printf '
--- components/AppProvider.js ---
' && sed -n '1,220p' components/AppProvider.js && printf '
--- styles/globals.css ---
' && sed -n '1,260p' styles/globals.css && printf '
--- tsconfig.json ---
' && sed -n '1,220p' tsconfig.json

cd /home/user/workspace && if [ -f app/favicon.ico ]; then rm -f app/favicon.ico; fi && find . -maxdepth 2 \( -path './node_modules' -o -path './.git' \) -prune -o -type f | sed 's#^./##' | sort | grep -E '^(app|components|pages|styles|next.config|tsconfig|package.json)' && npm run build

cd /home/user/workspace && python - <<'PY' from pathlib import Path p=Path('app/page.tsx') s=p.read_text() s=s.replace("import { headers } from 'next/headers';\n","") s=s.replace(" const userAgent = headers().get('user-agent') ?? '';\n","") s=s.replace("export default async function HomePage() {\n const posts = await getPosts();\n const userAgent = headers().get('user-agent') ?? '';\n const timestamp = new Date().toISOString();\n", "export default async function HomePage() {\n const posts = await getPosts();\n const timestamp = new Date().toISOString();\n") s=s.replace("

Your user agent: {userAgent}

\n","") p.write_text(s) PY npm run build
